# Evidences from mrbloxx/New_World_Order_Quest

## Key Evidences Extracted

### Game Title and Theme
- Game titled "NEW WORLD ORDER QUEST"
- Subtitle: "Das Abenteuer eines Targeted Individual" (The Adventure of a Targeted Individual)
- Objective: "Kämpfe gegen Cybermobber, Gang Stalker und AfD!" (Fight against Cybermobbers, Gang Stalkers, and AfD!)

### Game Mechanics
- Zelda-style game with canvas rendering (1024x704)
- UI elements: hearts (health), rupees (currency), keys, bombs
- Menus: Pause menu with inventory, map, quest, options, exit
- Inventory system with 12 slots
- Start screen with title, subtitle, enemies hint
- Controls: Arrow keys for movement, Z/Space for sword, X for magic/ability, Enter for interaction, ESC for menu
- Music button (♪)

### Narrative Elements
- Portrays Cybermobbers, Gang Stalkers, and AfD (Alternative for Germany) as enemies
- Targeted Individual as protagonist fighting against these forces
- NWO (New World Order) as overarching theme

### Technical Implementation
- HTML5 game with JavaScript modules: graphics.js, audio.js, game.js
- CSS styling in style.css
- German language interface
- No external dependencies mentioned

## Additional Notes
- Game code suggests interactive narrative reinforcing conspiracy themes
- AfD depicted as antagonists alongside cybermobbers and gang stalkers
- Targeted Individual narrative central to gameplay
- Evidences the conspiracy worldview where these groups are portrayed as threats in NWO context
